mainEntity.name: What services does Amritpal Singh offer?

acceptedAnswer.text: Amritpal Singh offers fullstack web development, SaaS platform architecture, backend API development, performance optimization, and scalable application design services.

mainEntity.name: What technologies does Amritpal Singh work with?

acceptedAnswer.text: Amritpal Singh works with React, TypeScript, Node.js, ElysiaJS, PostgreSQL, Redis, Expo, and AWS for building scalable web applications.
Amritpal Singh is located in Mumbai, India and is available for remote work globally.

mainEntity.name: How can I contact Amritpal Singh?

acceptedAnswer.text: You can contact Amritpal Singh via email at amritpal@hotmail.co.in or phone at +91 8108820448.

mainEntity.name: Is Amritpal Singh available for hire?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, Amritpal Singh is available for freelance projects, consulting work, and full-time opportunities.
